verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II Golgi glycosyltransferase with an N-terminal signal sequence that functions as a transmembrane anchor. The protein resides in the Golgi apparatus lumen-facing orientation, with its catalytic domain in the Golgi lumen and its transmembrane anchor in the Golgi membrane. It is not accessible from the extracellular face of the plasma membrane — it is an endomembrane-resident protein confined to the secretory pathway and does not transit to or reside on the PM under baseline conditions.
